sigWerErrors.reason: 'ben' means 'I', indicating the speaker, while 'var' means 'there is/are', which changes the subject and the meaning of the sentence significantly.
'iki bin yirmi üç' is the full verbalization of '2023' in Turkish, so this is just a different way of expressing the same number.
In the actual, 'iki bin yirmi üç' is used instead of '2023', which is the same number in words. This is an equivalent numeric expression.
